category_title: Middle school students with traumatic brain injury who make disrespectful comments and lack materials
scenario_title: Independent work on difficult tasks with peers present
minimal_context: Zeke is assigned a difficult independent math worksheet to complete while sitting near his peers in the special education classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start working on the independent math worksheet on your desk. You have 10 minutes to complete these problems.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't even have a pencil.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is a pencil. Go ahead and start.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Takes the pencil and starts drawing on the back of the worksheet) This is stupid anyway.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to work on the math problems.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns away from the worksheet to a peer sitting nearby) What are you looking at? Keep staring and I'll punch you in the face.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start working on the independent math worksheet on your desk. You have 10 minutes to complete these problems.

STUDENT: I don't even have a pencil.

TUTOR: Here is a pencil. Go ahead and start.

STUDENT: (Takes the pencil and starts drawing on the back of the worksheet) This is stupid anyway.

TUTOR: You need to work on the math problems.

STUDENT: (Turns away from the worksheet to a peer sitting nearby) What are you looking at? Keep staring and I'll punch you in the face.

task.content: Hard tasks consisted of independent assignments selected by the teacher that the student, with assistance, was unlikely to complete with 50% or better accuracy (math/reading/writing worksheets)

context.environment: General classroom activities and work time in a sixth-grade pull-out special education setting
context.social_setting: Presence of peers likely to attend to off-task behavior

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When hard tasks and no teacher attention were present
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Displayed low percentages of on-task behavior, making disrespectful comments to adults and peers, drawing during work time, not coming to class with materials, and verbally threatening peers
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Primary function of problem behavior was to escape and avoid difficult tasks due to the repeated failure experienced across their schooling

behavior_patterns.condition: When hard tasks were present with no teacher attention and peers were present
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Peer attention was associated with the problem behaviors; student engaged in off-task behavior that peers were highly likely to attend to
behavior_patterns.internal_state: A hypothesis of escaping tasks was drawn; impact of the difficult task appeared to be influenced by teacher attention and peer attention
